```python
import pytest
from your_module import validate_password  # Replace 'your_module' with the actual module name

class TestValidatePassword:
    """Unit tests for validate_password function using pytest."""

    def test_happy_path_valid_passwords(self):
        """Test cases where passwords meet all criteria (length >=8, upper, lower, digit)."""
        # Standard valid password
        assert validate_password("Password1") == True
        # Exactly 8 characters with one of each
        assert validate_password("A1b2c3d4") == True
        # Longer valid password
        assert validate_password("MySecurePassword123") == True
        # Valid with special characters (not required, but allowed)
        assert validate_password("Pass word1!") == True
        # Valid with multiple digits
        assert validate_password("Abcdefgh123") == True

    def test_edge_cases_minimum_requirements(self):
        """Test edge cases at the boundaries of requirements."""
        # Exactly 8 characters, just meeting criteria
        assert validate_password("A1b2c3d4") == True
        # Password with only one upper, one lower, one digit, and rest fillers
        assert validate_password("Aaaaaaaa1") == True
        # Password with digits at the end
        assert validate_password("Password123") == True

    def test_error_cases_invalid_passwords(self):
        """Test cases where passwords fail one or more criteria."""
        # Too short (length < 8)
        assert validate_password("Pass1") == False
        assert validate_password("A1b") == False
        assert validate_password("") == False
        assert validate_password("1234567") == False
        
        # Length >=8 but missing uppercase
        assert validate_password("password1") == False
        assert validate_password("abcdefgh1") == False
        
        # Length >=8 but missing lowercase
        assert validate_password("PASSWORD1") == False
        assert validate_password("ABCDEFGH1") == False
        
        # Length >=8 but missing digit
        assert validate_password("Password") == False
        assert validate_password("Abcdefgh") == False
        
        # Length >=8 but missing multiple criteria
        assert validate_password("12345678") == False  # No letters
        assert validate_password("ABCDEFGH") == False  # No lower/digit
        assert validate_password("password") == False  # No upper/digit
        assert validate_password("PASS123") == False   # No lower
        
        # Exactly 7 characters, valid otherwise
        assert validate_password("Passwor") == False
```
